description: A player reconnecting to its relay after an ordinary disconnect presents its persisted channel token. The relay's response is neither a network-level failure nor ordinary success, but an explicit CHANNEL_TOKEN_REVOKED indication because the screen record no longer exists. The player clears only its channel token, leaves its persisted relay address and trust-anchor material untouched, and re-enters Pairing redemption - contrasted with an unreachable/unavailable connection failure, which this section requires clear nothing at all.
